amount.description: Number of persons for this booking (real API wire type is a numeric string).

start.description: Booking start time, Unix seconds as a string (real API wire shape).

end.description: Booking end time, Unix seconds as a string.

length.description: Booking length in minutes, as a string.

status.description: Numeric status code as a string (see setBookingStatus write action for the named status vocabulary).

guest_name.description: Computed from the nested guest.name field.

guest_id.description: Computed from the nested guest.id field.

guest_email.description: Computed from the nested guest.email field.

guest_mobile.description: Computed from the nested guest.mobile field.

guest.description: Full raw guest sub-object, passed through unchanged alongside the flattened guest_* computed fields.
